description: Machine-readable schema for the mercury-composable rest.yaml DSL (HTTP endpoint -> service/flow mapping). Mirrors rest-grammar.md. An AI agent should ingest this to author and validate rest.yaml deterministically. The authoritative HTTP-method set is RoutingEntry.VALID_METHODS; a CI drift test keeps this catalog in sync.

top_level.meaning: reusable CORS configs, referenced by a rest entry's cors:
reusable header-transform configs, referenced by headers:

rest_entry_fields.meaning: function route, or [primary, secondary], or http(s):// URL (relay); use http.flow.adapter to bind a flow
list from http_methods (OPTIONS auto-added; do not list it)
URI path; supports {param} variables and a trailing * wildcard (case-insensitive)
id of a cors entry (must exist)
id of a headers entry (must exist)
a service route, or routing specs: 'default: svc' / 'header: svc' / 'header: value: svc'
list of exactly two strings [from, to] - HTTP(S) relay only

http_methods_note: OPTIONS is auto-added by the parser; user entries must not list it.

binding_modes.behavior: route the request to a composable function
proxy to an external URL (url_rewrite, trust_all_cert apply)
primary serves the response; secondary gets a copy

cors_block.rule: each options/headers entry must be an 'Access-Control-*: value' line

headers_block.rule: add entries are 'header-name: value'; drop/keep are header names (case-insensitive); keep retains only the listed headers

invariants: every rest entry has service, methods, and url
methods values come from http_methods; OPTIONS is auto-added (do not list it)
a cors:/headers: reference must match an existing cors/headers id
url_rewrite is a list of exactly two strings; url_rewrite and trust_all_cert apply only to http(s):// relay services
an HTTP-relay service must be a single URL (not a list, not mixed with function routes)
